items.headline: Bank of America (BAC) Stock Draws Fresh Price Target Split After Mixed Analyst Revisions
items.summary: Price target changes around Bank of America have ranged from cuts of US$3 to US$10 to increases of US$1 to US$6, even as a central fair value estimate holds steady at about US$63.16. These mixed moves reflect analysts revisiting earnings assumptions, valuation frameworks, and execution risk, with some large firms turning more cautious while others see enough earnings power and capital strength to support higher targets. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting signals and...
